title: Switzerland by Friday

mood.label: Cautiously hopeful
mood.summary: The US and Iran confirmed a deal to end their three-month war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, sending global markets soaring and oil to a three-month low, but the deal is unsigned, Israel bombed Beirut the same day, and Ukraine's war, Sudan's confirmed famine and the Mindanao quake aftermath keep the relief provisional.

style.genre: bright indie-pop / afrobeat-tinged — sampled vibraphone riff and mallets over a crisp TR-909 lite kit, plucked guitar topline and a warm sine sub, A lydian's raised fourth opening the room without losing its guard

sampleSources: Strudel default library — VCSL vibraphone for the chordal riff and the high mallet sparkle, RolandTR909 drum machine for the lite four-on-the-floor kit, acoustic guitar (VCSL) for the plucked topline, supporting sine sub-bass and a low sawtooth pad
pattern: stack(s("bd ~ ~ ~ bd ~ ~ ~ bd ~ ~ ~ bd ~ ~ ~, ~ ~ ~ ~ cp ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ cp ~ ~ ~, ~ ~ hh ~ ~ ~ hh ~ ~ ~ hh ~ ~ ~ hh ~, ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ rim ~").bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.5).hpf(38).room(0.16).rsize(4).swingBy(0.06, 4), note("a1 ~ ~ a1 ~ ~ e2 ~ a1 ~ ~ ~ fs1 ~ ~ ~").s("sine").attack(0.01).release(0.4).lpf(420).gain(0.54), note("<[a3,cs4,e4,gs4] [b3,ds4,fs4,a4] [fs3,a3,cs4,e4] [d3,fs3,a3,cs4]>").s("vibraphone").gain(0.34).lpf(sine.range(900,2200).slow(12)).room(0.34).rsize(6).attack(0.005).release(0.6).delay(0.16).delaytime(0.375).pan(0.45).slow(2), note("<[a4,e5,a5] [b4,fs5,a5] [cs5,fs5,a5] [a4,d5,fs5]>").s("sawtooth").attack(3).decay(1.5).sustain(0.4).release(5).lpf(sine.range(500,1100).slow(24)).gain(0.05).room(0.6).rsize(8), note("e5 ~ fs5 a5 ~ gs5 fs5 ~ ~ e5 ~ ds5 ~ ~ cs5 ~ ~ b4 ~ cs5 ~ e5 ~ fs5 ~ ~ a5 ~ gs5 ~ fs5 ~").s("vibraphone").gain(0.26).lpf(3200).room(0.4).rsize(6).pan(0.6).delay(0.28).delaytime(0.5).gain(sine.range(0.2,0.32).slow(16)), note("a4 ~ ~ cs5 ~ ~ e5 ~ ~ fs5 ~ ~ e5 ~ cs5 ~ ~ ~ b4 ~ ~ cs5 ~ ~ ~ a4 ~ ~ ~ fs4 ~ ~").s("guitar").gain(0.24).lpf(2600).room(0.36).rsize(5).pan(0.34).delay(0.3).delaytime(0.375).off(0.25, x => x.gain(0.1).pan(0.2).lpf(1700)).slow(2))

lines: Three months of fire and then a sentence on a screen — it's over, they agreed, the strait swings wide,
the tankers find their lane and the oil price falls through the floor, and the markets climb like they've got nothing left to hide;
but the page that ends the war is still a page no one has signed, the pens are flying to a lake town in the Alps,
Switzerland by Friday, if the ink behaves by Friday — I'll believe the quiet when I hear the quiet stop.
Same afternoon the sky over Beirut came apart, and Dnipro still wakes to the drones in the dark,
El Fasher's hunger has a name on it now, official, and Mindanao keeps digging through the aftershock and the mark;
so the brightest day in weeks comes holding both its hands open — relief on one palm, the unfinished on the other,
and I'll take the lift in my chest if you let me keep my guard, the way you love a fragile thing and call it lover.
Switzerland by Friday — say it like a wish you don't quite trust, a raised note hanging where the room gets tall,
the war agreed but not yet signed, the cure and the crater on the same tide,
I'll let the morning in, I'll let it warm me to the wall — cautiously, the way the light comes after all;
if the ink dries clean by Friday I will dance in A lydian, but tonight I keep one foot against the door.
